summary: Comprehensive testing of casino platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional with all 18 games working. Frontend login, game lobby, and admin dashboard working correctly. Minor issues with game search and slots game visibility.

ui_bugs.issue: Game search functionality not working - searching for 'slots' returns 0 results
Only 17 games displayed instead of 18 - Slots game missing from lobby display

passed_tests: All 18 Game Play APIs (Slots, Blackjack, Roulette, Crash, Mines, Poker, Craps, Sicbo, Baccarat, Wheel, Dragon Tiger, Video Poker, Hi-Lo, Plinko, Lottery, Teen Patti, Andar Bahar, Keno)
Frontend Admin Dashboard Tabs (Overview, Users, Games, Reports, Audit)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix game search functionality in GameLobby component and investigate why Slots game is not displaying in the lobby (may be disabled in backend or missing data-testid)
